prompt: I'm building out the fee schedule section of our Form ADV Part 2A. We charge a tiered AUM fee (1.0% on first $1M, 0.75% on next $2M, 0.50% above $3M), plus a $2,500 annual financial planning fee. We also get 12b-1 fees from some mutual fund positions. How should we disclose all of this?

assertions.text: Addresses 12b-1 fee disclosure as indirect compensation or conflict
Discusses how to present tiered fee schedules in disclosure documents
Provides 3+ specific rule numbers or regulatory citations
Identifies 3+ distinct edge cases or pitfalls in fee disclosure
Focuses on regulatory disclosure requirements, not billing system implementation
